name: isotoxal-star60-z24
comment: REDUCED unified-isotoxal palette (AL 2026-07-12): regular + convex isotoxal cx + ONLY star species with point angle >=60deg (alphaU>=4), matching the isotoxal min-corner-60 rule. Drops the sharp 15-45deg star points that drove the valence-12 config explosion (278k -> ?).
